creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
I'm trying to eliminate version mismatches by logging on to SSH from the same host, so the client and server are the same system. The only other server involved is the KDC, which is running Linux and FreeIPA.

Here is the log from the SSH client:

OpenSSH_8.8p1, OpenSSL 1.1.1o-freebsd  3 May 2022

debug3: expanded UserKnownHostsFile '~/.ssh/known_hosts2' -> '/home/********/.ssh/known_hosts2'
